revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Add categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]) --> This template is placed on [[Wikipedia:Category|category pages]] and in [[Wikipedia:Template documentation|template documentation]] to warn about bots, depending on those categories and templates. These pages with this template will be added to [[:Category:Pages monitored by Wikipedia bots]].
== Parameters == * Use {{Para|subcats|yes}} to show "This category and subcategories are used by one or more bots." (technically it outputs "This {{var|namespace}} and subcategories are used by one or more bots.") instead of "This {{var|namespace}} are used by one or more bots." * Use {{Para|bots|<nowiki>*[[User:ExampleBot]] operated by [[User:Example]]</nowiki>}} to list bot usernames (alternatively {{Para|bots|<nowiki>[[Wikipedia:Bots/Requests for approval/Example|Example]]</nowiki>}} can be used) * Use {{Para|namespace|infobox}} to override the {{para|namespace}} name and show "This infobox is...", etc. Other values can be substituted here.
== Breaking changes == <!-- Verbatim copied and adapted from [[Template:Twinkle standard installation]] for use as appropriate here. --> In the context of this notice, "breaking changes" are any changes to a template that change how it is used, for example adding, removing, or renaming any parameters, or changing the required format of the input to a parameter.
For notice templates (like [[:Category:User warning templates]]), rewordings of the template's contents that change the tone or central message of the template are also considered a breaking change.
== Templatedata == <templatedata> { "description": "A message box template to notify about Template or Categories monitored by bots.", "params": { "namespace": { "label": "Namespace", "description": "Automatically specifies the namespace of the page (e.g., template, category etc.) use to show others like 'Infobox', .", "type": "string", "required": false }, "subcats": { "label": "Subcategories", "description": "Use 'Yes' to Specify whether this template applies to subcategories. (Use only on category namespace)", "type": "boolean", "required": false }, "bot": { "label": "Bot", "description": "Other relavent bots username", "type": "string", "required": false }, "bots": { "label": "Bots", "description": "Bot username ([[User:ExampleBot]] operated by [[User:Example]]) or list bot usernames alternatively ([[Wikipedia:Bots/Requests for approval/Example|Example]])", "type": "string", "required": false } } }
</templatedata> == See also == * {{tl|Twinkle standard installation}} * {{tl|AWB standard installation}}
<includeonly>{{sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Courtesy templates]] [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[Category:Templates using TemplateData]] }}</includeonly>
<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Add categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]) --> This template is placed on [[Wikipedia:Category|category pages]] and in [[Wikipedia:Template documentation|template documentation]] to warn about bots, depending on those categories and templates. These pages with this template will be added to [[:Category:Pages monitored by Wikipedia bots]].
== Parameters == * Use {{Para|subcats|yes}} to show "This category and subcategories are used by one or more bots." (technically it outputs "This {{var|namespace}} and subcategories are used by one or more bots.") instead of "This {{var|namespace}} are used by one or more bots." * Use {{Para|bots|<nowiki>*[[User:ExampleBot]] operated by [[User:Example]]</nowiki>}} to list bot usernames (alternatively {{Para|bots|<nowiki>[[Wikipedia:Bots/Requests for approval/Example|Example]]</nowiki>}} can be used) * Use {{Para|namespace|infobox}} to override the {{para|namespace}} name and show "This infobox is...", etc. Other values can be substituted here.
== Breaking changes == <!-- Verbatim copied and adapted from [[Template:Twinkle standard installation]] for use as appropriate here. --> In the context of this notice, "breaking changes" are any changes to a template that change how it is used, for example adding, removing, or renaming any parameters, or changing the required format of the input to a parameter.
For notice templates (like [[:Category:User warning templates]]), rewordings of the template's contents that change the tone or central message of the template are also considered a breaking change.
== Templatedata == <templatedata> { "description": "A message box template to notify about Template or Categories monitored by bots.", "params": { "namespace": { "label": "Namespace", "description": "Automatically specifies the namespace of the page (e.g., template, category etc.) use to show others like 'Infobox', .", "type": "string", "required": false }, "subcats": { "label": "Subcategories", "description": "Use 'Yes' to Specify whether this template applies to subcategories. (Use only on category namespace)", "type": "boolean", "required": false }, "bot": { "label": "Bot", "description": "Other relavent bots username", "type": "string", "required": false }, "bots": { "label": "Bots", "description": "Bot username ([[User:ExampleBot]] operated by [[User:Example]]) or list bot usernames alternatively ([[Wikipedia:Bots/Requests for approval/Example|Example]])", "type": "string", "required": false } } }
</templatedata> == See also == * {{tl|Twinkle standard installation}} * {{tl|AWB standard installation}}
<includeonly>{{sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Courtesy templates]] [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[Category:Templates using TemplateData]] }}</includeonly>
<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Add categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]) --> This template is placed on [[Wikipedia:Category|category pages]] and in [[Wikipedia:Template documentation|template documentation]] to warn about bots, depending on those categories and templates. These pages with this template will be added to [[:Category:Pages monitored by Wikipedia bots]].
== Parameters == * Use {{Para|subcats|yes}} to show "This category and subcategories are used by one or more bots." (technically it outputs "This {{var|namespace}} and subcategories are used by one or more bots.") instead of "This {{var|namespace}} are used by one or more bots." * Use {{Para|bots|<nowiki>*[[User:ExampleBot]] operated by [[User:Example]]</nowiki>}} to list bot usernames (alternatively {{Para|bots|<nowiki>[[Wikipedia:Bots/Requests for approval/Example|Example]]</nowiki>}} can be used) * Use {{Para|namespace|infobox}} to override the {{para|namespace}} name and show "This infobox is...", etc. Other values can be substituted here.
== Breaking changes == <!-- Verbatim copied and adapted from [[Template:Twinkle standard installation]] for use as appropriate here. --> In the context of this notice, "breaking changes" are any changes to a template that change how it is used, for example adding, removing, or renaming any parameters, or changing the required format of the input to a parameter.
For notice templates (like [[:Category:User warning templates]]), rewordings of the template's contents that change the tone or central message of the template are also considered a breaking change.
== Templatedata == <templatedata> { "description": "A message box template to notify about Template or Categories monitored by bots.", "params": { "namespace": { "label": "Namespace", "description": "Automatically specifies the namespace of the page (e.g., template, category etc.) use to show others like 'Infobox', .", "type": "string", "required": false }, "subcats": { "label": "Subcategories", "description": "Use 'Yes' to Specify whether this template applies to subcategories. (Use only on category namespace)", "type": "boolean", "required": false }, "bot": { "label": "Bot", "description": "Other relavent bots username", "type": "string", "required": false }, "bots": { "label": "Bots", "description": "Bot username ([[User:ExampleBot]] operated by [[User:Example]]) or list bot usernames alternatively ([[Wikipedia:Bots/Requests for approval/Example|Example]])", "type": "string", "required": false } } }
</templatedata> == See also == * {{tl|Twinkle standard installation}} * {{tl|AWB standard installation}}
<includeonly>{{sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Courtesy templates]] [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[Category:Templates using TemplateData]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Add categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]) --> This template is placed on [[Wikipedia:Category|category pages]] and in [[Wikipedia:Template documentation|template documentation]] to warn about bots, depending on those categories and templates. These pages with this template will be added to [[:Category:Pages monitored by Wikipedia bots]].
== Parameters == * Use {{Para|subcats|yes}} to show "This category and subcategories are used by one or more bots." (technically it outputs "This {{var|namespace}} and subcategories are used by one or more bots.") instead of "This {{var|namespace}} are used by one or more bots." * Use {{Para|bots|<nowiki>*[[User:ExampleBot]] operated by [[User:Example]]</nowiki>}} to list bot usernames (alternatively {{Para|bots|<nowiki>[[Wikipedia:Bots/Requests for approval/Example|Example]]</nowiki>}} can be used) * Use {{Para|namespace|infobox}} to override the {{para|namespace}} name and show "This infobox is...", etc. Other values can be substituted here.
== Breaking changes == <!-- Verbatim copied and adapted from [[Template:Twinkle standard installation]] for use as appropriate here. --> In the context of this notice, "breaking changes" are any changes to a template that change how it is used, for example adding, removing, or renaming any parameters, or changing the required format of the input to a parameter.
For notice templates (like [[:Category:User warning templates]]), rewordings of the template's contents that change the tone or central message of the template are also considered a breaking change.
== Templatedata == <templatedata> { "description": "A message box template to notify about Template or Categories monitored by bots.", "params": { "namespace": { "label": "Namespace", "description": "Automatically specifies the namespace of the page (e.g., template, category etc.) use to show others like 'Infobox', .", "type": "string", "required": false }, "subcats": { "label": "Subcategories", "description": "Use 'Yes' to Specify whether this template applies to subcategories. (Use only on category namespace)", "type": "boolean", "required": false }, "bot": { "label": "Bot", "description": "Other relavent bots username", "type": "string", "required": false }, "bots": { "label": "Bots", "description": "Bot username ([[User:ExampleBot]] operated by [[User:Example]]) or list bot usernames alternatively ([[Wikipedia:Bots/Requests for approval/Example|Example]])", "type": "string", "required": false } } }
</templatedata> == See also == * {{tl|Twinkle standard installation}} * {{tl|AWB standard installation}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Add categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]) --> This template is placed on [[Wikipedia:Category|category pages]] and in [[Wikipedia:Template documentation|template documentation]] to warn about bots, depending on those categories and templates. These pages with this template will be added to [[:Category:Pages monitored by Wikipedia bots]].
== Parameters == * Use {{Para|subcats|yes}} to show "This category and subcategories are used by one or more bots." (technically it outputs "This {{var|namespace}} and subcategories are used by one or more bots.") instead of "This {{var|namespace}} are used by one or more bots." * Use {{Para|bots|<nowiki>*[[User:ExampleBot]] operated by [[User:Example]]</nowiki>}} to list bot usernames (alternatively {{Para|bots|<nowiki>[[Wikipedia:Bots/Requests for approval/Example|Example]]</nowiki>}} can be used) * Use {{Para|namespace|infobox}} to override the {{para|namespace}} name and show "This infobox is...", etc. Other values can be substituted here.
== Breaking changes == <!-- Verbatim copied and adapted from [[Template:Twinkle standard installation]] for use as appropriate here. --> In the context of this notice, "breaking changes" are any changes to a template that change how it is used, for example adding, removing, or renaming any parameters, or changing the required format of the input to a parameter.
For notice templates (like [[:Category:User warning templates]]), rewordings of the template's contents that change the tone or central message of the template are also considered a breaking change.
== Templatedata == <templatedata> { "description": "A message box template to notify about Template or Categories monitored by bots.", "params": { "namespace": { "label": "Namespace", "description": "Automatically specifies the namespace of the page (e.g., template, category etc.) use to show others like 'Infobox', .", "type": "string", "required": false }, "subcats": { "label": "Subcategories", "description": "Use 'Yes' to Specify whether this template applies to subcategories. (Use only on category namespace)", "type": "boolean", "required": false }, "bot": { "label": "Bot", "description": "Other relavent bots username", "type": "string", "required": false }, "bots": { "label": "Bots", "description": "Bot username ([[User:ExampleBot]] operated by [[User:Example]]) or list bot usernames alternatively ([[Wikipedia:Bots/Requests for approval/Example|Example]])", "type": "string", "required": false } } }
</templatedata> == See also == * {{tl|Twinkle standard installation}} * {{tl|AWB standard installation}}
<includeonly>{{sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Courtesy templates]] [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[Category:Templates using TemplateData]] }}</includeonly>
<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Add categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]) --> This template is placed on [[Wikipedia:Category|category pages]] and in [[Wikipedia:Template documentation|template documentation]] to warn about bots, depending on those categories and templates. These pages with this template will be added to [[:Category:Pages monitored by Wikipedia bots]].
== Parameters == * Use {{Para|subcats|yes}} to show "This category and subcategories are used by one or more bots." (technically it outputs "This {{var|namespace}} and subcategories are used by one or more bots.") instead of "This {{var|namespace}} are used by one or more bots." * Use {{Para|bots|<nowiki>*[[User:ExampleBot]] operated by [[User:Example]]</nowiki>}} to list bot usernames (alternatively {{Para|bots|<nowiki>[[Wikipedia:Bots/Requests for approval/Example|Example]]</nowiki>}} can be used) * Use {{Para|namespace|infobox}} to override the {{para|namespace}} name and show "This infobox is...", etc. Other values can be substituted here.
== Breaking changes == <!-- Verbatim copied and adapted from [[Template:Twinkle standard installation]] for use as appropriate here. --> In the context of this notice, "breaking changes" are any changes to a template that change how it is used, for example adding, removing, or renaming any parameters, or changing the required format of the input to a parameter.
For notice templates (like [[:Category:User warning templates]]), rewordings of the template's contents that change the tone or central message of the template are also considered a breaking change.
== Templatedata == <templatedata> { "description": "A message box template to notify about Template or Categories monitored by bots.", "params": { "namespace": { "label": "Namespace", "description": "Automatically specifies the namespace of the page (e.g., template, category etc.) use to show others like 'Infobox', .", "type": "string", "required": false }, "subcats": { "label": "Subcategories", "description": "Use 'Yes' to Specify whether this template applies to subcategories. (Use only on category namespace)", "type": "boolean", "required": false }, "bot": { "label": "Bot", "description": "Other relavent bots username", "type": "string", "required": false }, "bots": { "label": "Bots", "description": "Bot username ([[User:ExampleBot]] operated by [[User:Example]]) or list bot usernames alternatively ([[Wikipedia:Bots/Requests for approval/Example|Example]])", "type": "string", "required": false } } }
</templatedata> == See also == * {{tl|Twinkle standard installation}} * {{tl|AWB standard installation}}
<includeonly>{{sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Courtesy templates]] [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[Category:Templates using TemplateData]] }}</includeonly>
<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23127601988|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Add categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]) --> This template is placed on [[Wikipedia:Category|category pages]] and in [[Wikipedia:Template documentation|template documentation]] to warn about bots, depending on those categories and templates. These pages with this template will be added to [[:Category:Pages monitored by Wikipedia bots]].
== Parameters == * Use {{Para|subcats|yes}} to show "This category and subcategories are used by one or more bots." (technically it outputs "This {{var|namespace}} and subcategories are used by one or more bots.") instead of "This {{var|namespace}} are used by one or more bots." * Use {{Para|bots|<nowiki>*[[User:ExampleBot]] operated by [[User:Example]]</nowiki>}} to list bot usernames (alternatively {{Para|bots|<nowiki>[[Wikipedia:Bots/Requests for approval/Example|Example]]</nowiki>}} can be used) * Use {{Para|namespace|infobox}} to override the {{para|namespace}} name and show "This infobox is...", etc. Other values can be substituted here.
== Breaking changes == <!-- Verbatim copied and adapted from [[Template:Twinkle standard installation]] for use as appropriate here. --> In the context of this notice, "breaking changes" are any changes to a template that change how it is used, for example adding, removing, or renaming any parameters, or changing the required format of the input to a parameter.
For notice templates (like [[:Category:User warning templates]]), rewordings of the template's contents that change the tone or central message of the template are also considered a breaking change.
== Templatedata == <templatedata> { "description": "A message box template to notify about Template or Categories monitored by bots.", "params": { "namespace": { "label": "Namespace", "description": "Automatically specifies the namespace of the page (e.g., template, category etc.) use to show others like 'Infobox', .", "type": "string", "required": false }, "subcats": { "label": "Subcategories", "description": "Use 'Yes' to Specify whether this template applies to subcategories. (Use only on category namespace)", "type": "boolean", "required": false }, "bot": { "label": "Bot", "description": "Other relavent bots username", "type": "string", "required": false }, "bots": { "label": "Bots", "description": "Bot username ([[User:ExampleBot]] operated by [[User:Example]]) or list bot usernames alternatively ([[Wikipedia:Bots/Requests for approval/Example|Example]])", "type": "string", "required": false } } }
</templatedata> == See also == * {{tl|Twinkle standard installation}} * {{tl|AWB standard installation}}
<includeonly>{{sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line; interwikis at Wikidata --> }}</includeonly>
<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Courtesy templates]] [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[Category:Templates using TemplateData]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Add categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]) --> This template is placed on [[Wikipedia:Category|category pages]] and in [[Wikipedia:Template documentation|template documentation]] to warn about bots, depending on those categories and templates. These pages with this template will be added to [[:Category:Pages monitored by Wikipedia bots]].
== Parameters == * Use {{Para|subcats|yes}} to show "This category and subcategories are used by one or more bots." (technically it outputs "This {{var|namespace}} and subcategories are used by one or more bots.") instead of "This {{var|namespace}} are used by one or more bots." * Use {{Para|bots|<nowiki>*[[User:ExampleBot]] operated by [[User:Example]]</nowiki>}} to list bot usernames (alternatively {{Para|bots|<nowiki>[[Wikipedia:Bots/Requests for approval/Example|Example]]</nowiki>}} can be used) * Use {{Para|namespace|infobox}} to override the {{para|namespace}} name and show "This infobox is...", etc. Other values can be substituted here.
== Breaking changes == <!-- Verbatim copied and adapted from [[Template:Twinkle standard installation]] for use as appropriate here. --> In the context of this notice, "breaking changes" are any changes to a template that change how it is used, for example adding, removing, or renaming any parameters, or changing the required format of the input to a parameter.
For notice templates (like [[:Category:User warning templates]]), rewordings of the template's contents that change the tone or central message of the template are also considered a breaking change.
== Templatedata == <templatedata> { "description": "A message box template to notify about Template or Categories monitored by bots.", "params": { "namespace": { "label": "Namespace", "description": "Automatically specifies the namespace of the page (e.g., template, category etc.) use to show others like 'Infobox', .", "type": "string", "required": false }, "subcats": { "label": "Subcategories", "description": "Use 'Yes' to Specify whether this template applies to subcategories. (Use only on category namespace)", "type": "boolean", "required": false }, "bot": { "label": "Bot", "description": "Other relavent bots username", "type": "string", "required": false }, "bots": { "label": "Bots", "description": "Bot username ([[User:ExampleBot]] operated by [[User:Example]]) or list bot usernames alternatively ([[Wikipedia:Bots/Requests for approval/Example|Example]])", "type": "string", "required": false } } }
</templatedata> == See also == * {{tl|Twinkle standard installation}} * {{tl|AWB standard installation}}
<includeonly>{{sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line; interwikis at Wikidata --> }}</includeonly>
<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Bot_use_warning%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Bot_use_warning%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Add categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]) --> This template is placed on [[Wikipedia:Category|category pages]] and in [[Wikipedia:Template documentation|template documentation]] to warn about bots, depending on those categories and templates. These pages with this template will be added to [[:Category:Pages monitored by Wikipedia bots]].
== Parameters == * Use {{Para|subcats|yes}} to show "This category and subcategories are used by one or more bots." (technically it outputs "This {{var|namespace}} and subcategories are used by one or more bots.") instead of "This {{var|namespace}} are used by one or more bots." * Use {{Para|bots|<nowiki>*[[User:ExampleBot]] operated by [[User:Example]]</nowiki>}} to list bot usernames (alternatively {{Para|bots|<nowiki>[[Wikipedia:Bots/Requests for approval/Example|Example]]</nowiki>}} can be used) * Use {{Para|namespace|infobox}} to override the {{para|namespace}} name and show "This infobox is...", etc. Other values can be substituted here.
== Breaking changes == <!-- Verbatim copied and adapted from [[Template:Twinkle standard installation]] for use as appropriate here. --> In the context of this notice, "breaking changes" are any changes to a template that change how it is used, for example adding, removing, or renaming any parameters, or changing the required format of the input to a parameter.
For notice templates (like [[:Category:User warning templates]]), rewordings of the template's contents that change the tone or central message of the template are also considered a breaking change.
== Templatedata == <templatedata> { "description": "A message box template to notify about Template or Categories monitored by bots.", "params": { "namespace": { "label": "Namespace", "description": "Automatically specifies the namespace of the page (e.g., template, category etc.) use to show others like 'Infobox', .", "type": "string", "required": false }, "subcats": { "label": "Subcategories", "description": "Use 'Yes' to Specify whether this template applies to subcategories. (Use only on category namespace)", "type": "boolean", "required": false }, "bot": { "label": "Bot", "description": "Other relavent bots username", "type": "string", "required": false }, "bots": { "label": "Bots", "description": "Bot username ([[User:ExampleBot]] operated by [[User:Example]]) or list bot usernames alternatively ([[Wikipedia:Bots/Requests for approval/Example|Example]])", "type": "string", "required": false } } }
</templatedata> == See also == * {{tl|Twinkle standard installation}} * {{tl|AWB standard installation}}
<includeonly>{{sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line; interwikis at Wikidata --> }}</includeonly>
<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Courtesy templates]] [[Category:Category namespace templates]] [[Category:Templates using TemplateData]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
